nf/quick-373-add-advisory-baseline-check.task_description: Add advisory baseline check to nf:solve, nudge in nf:progress, fix DIAG-02 residual=-1 for missing baselines, optional --require-baselines flag

out_of_scope: Baseline validation gate in CI/CD pipeline
Changes to existing baseline definitions or schema
